scope_filter.title: Scope Filter
scope_filter.help_text: Filter inferences by scope attributes like population, condition, dosage, etc. Only relations matching all filter criteria will be included in the inference.

notifications.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
notifications.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
notifications.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
notifications.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
notifications.http_403: You don't have permission to perform this action.
notifications.http_404: The requested resource was not found.
notifications.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

import.upload_description: Import entities in bulk from a CSV or JSON file. Maximum 500 rows.
import.csv_hint: CSV must have a header row with columns:
import.json_hint: JSON must be an array of objects with keys:

source_import.upload_description: Import sources in bulk from a BibTeX, RIS, or JSON file. Maximum 500 entries.
source_import.ris_hint: RIS format with TY, TI, AU, PY, ER tags.
source_import.json_hint: JSON array with title, kind, authors, year, url, origin fields.

entity.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this entity? This action cannot be undone.

create_entity.title: Create Entity
create_entity.description: Create a new entity in the knowledge graph. The slug is a unique identifier for this entity.

edit_entity.title: Edit Entity
edit_entity.description: Update the entity information. The slug is the unique identifier for this entity.

source.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this source? This will also delete all relations associated with it. This action cannot be undone.

create_source.title: Create Source
create_source.description: Create a new source for the knowledge graph. Sources are references that provide the foundation for relations and claims.
create_source.url_help: Link to the source document or webpage

edit_source.title: Edit Source
edit_source.description: Update the source information. Sources provide the foundation for relations and claims.

relation.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this relation? This action cannot be undone.

relations.title: Relations
relations.view_by_source: Relations are currently organized by source. To view relations, please visit the Sources page and select a source.
relations.explanation: Relations in this system are tied to sources. Each relation must come from a specific source, ensuring traceability and trust.

edit_relation.title: Edit Relation
edit_relation.description: Update the relation details. Note that the source cannot be changed.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Enter your current password and choose a new password. Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
change_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.email_help: You may need to verify your new email address
settings.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
settings.deactivate_warning: Temporarily disable your account without deleting your data. You can reactivate it later by logging in again.
settings.deactivate_confirmation: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? Your account will be temporarily disabled, but you can reactivate it by logging in again. Your data will be preserved.
settings.delete_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This action is permanent and will remove all your data.
settings.delete_confirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.

home.title: HyphaGraph
home.subtitle: Hypergraph-based Evidence Knowledge System
home.description: Build and explore a knowledge graph with computed inferences. Track entities, sources, and relations with confidence scores and evidence aggregation.
home.step1Desc: Add research papers, articles, or datasets as evidence sources.
home.step2Desc: Create entities representing concepts, drugs, conditions, or any domain objects.
home.step3Desc: Connect entities through relations from your sources, specifying roles and confidence.
home.step4Desc: View computed role inferences with aggregated scores, confidence, and disagreement metrics.

inferences.title: Computed Inferences
inferences.noEntities: No entities found. Create entities and relations to see computed inferences.

explanation.title: Inference Explanation
explanation.high_disagreement: High disagreement detected - sources significantly contradict each other
explanation.contradictions_note: The sources below show opposing evidence. Review them carefully to understand the full picture.
explanation.source_evidence_desc: Click on any source to view its full details

filters.title: Filters
filters.no_results: No items match the current filters

reset_password.title: Set New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
reset_password.error: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
reset_password.success_message: Your password has been successfully reset.

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.check_email_message: If an account exists for that email address, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgot_password.check_spam: Please check your inbox and spam folder.

batch_relations.max_rows_warning: Maximum of {{max}} relations per batch reached.
batch_relations.error_roles_required: At least one role is required
batch_relations.error_role_fields_required: Each role must have an entity and a role type

extraction_preview.title: Extraction Complete!
extraction_preview.high_confidence_rest: All entities have exact or synonym matches. You can quick-save or review details below.
extraction_preview.review_msg: Review extracted entities and relations before saving to the knowledge graph.
extraction_preview.no_entities_alert: No entities selected. Please select at least one entity to create or link before saving.
extraction_preview.all_validated: All entities validated with high confidence
extraction_preview.review_guidance: Review entities and relations above, then save to add them to the knowledge graph.
extraction_preview.all_skipped: All entities skipped. Adjust decisions above to enable saving.
